strategy: He is immune to globals, so skip Doom and Gloom or global buffs; they will not stick.
He repeatedly casts an all-team Mana Burn (Shadow) that also strips a Shadow Pip, so do not hoard pips - build blades and hit before he burns them off.
Attacking him makes him interrupt-cast Orthrus back at the team, so expect a counter every time you commit a hit.
Shielding is fine and even helpful - it makes him cast Guidance (accuracy) on all wizards - but that response only fires once per round.
At 4,500 health with no listed resist, stack a couple of blades plus Feint and end it in one hit before the pip drain and Banish cards pile up.
cheatNotes: Join late and he hands the whole team a Banish! (7 Pip) card - arrive on time to skip it.
The Banish card auto-fires when picked rather than letting you aim it.
After Round 1 he gives every wizard a Banish! (7 Pip) card regardless, so expect it in your hand.
Any attack on him makes him interrupt-cast Orthrus at the team.
If a wizard shields, he casts Guidance (accuracy buff) on all wizards - harmless to you.
That Guidance response only fires once per round.
He repeatedly casts an all-team Mana Burn (Shadow) that also strips one Shadow Pip, so do not sit on pips.
Expect the Mana Burn to keep coming round after round.
